---
id: metadata-lifecycle-diagram
title: Metadata Lifecycle Diagram
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Metadata Lifecycle Diagram

## End-to-End Flow from Document Creation to Schema Evolution

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down lifecycle flow diagram for governed metadata, with two embedded validation loops and one schema-evolution feedback loop. Linear spine (top to bottom): Create Document → Add Metadata → CI Validation → Publish → Drift Detection → Drift Issue Created → Owner Acknowledgment → Remediation PR → CI Validation (second instance) → Merge + Resolve → Dashboard Update → Quarterly Review → Schema Evolution. Decision arrows: from the first CI Validation, a "Pass" arrow forwards to Publish; a "Fail" arrow loops back to Add Metadata. From Drift Detection, "No Drift" stays at Publish; "Drift Found" advances to Drift Issue Created. From the second CI Validation, "Pass" forwards to Merge + Resolve; "Fail" loops back to Remediation PR. A long curved feedback arrow at the right edge connects Schema Evolution back to Add Metadata at the top, closing the lifecycle. Engineering blueprint style, neutral slate, federal navy (#1F3A5F) for primary stages, teal (#1A9E8F) for validation gates, amber (#D4A017) for the schema-evolution feedback, red (#C74040) for "Fail" branches, monospace labels, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
Create --> Metadata --> CI --> Publish
                    |
                    Fail --> back to Metadata

Publish --> Drift Detection --> No Drift --> Publish
                            |
                            Drift --> Issue --> Acknowledge --> Remediate --> CI --> Merge --> Dashboard --> Quarterly Review --> Schema Evolution --> Metadata
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
